channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: PSN was down for 'gaming & social' — here's what happened
item.description: Here we go again, PlayStation fans — PSN is down for 'Gaming & social' according to PlayStation's official status

item.title: MSI (re)launches $85,000 Nvidia DGX Station workstation with the Nvidia GB300 Ultra, a pair of 400GbE LAN ports, and 768GB of RAM
item.description: MSI XpertStation WS300 delivers deskside AI with Nvidia GB300 Ultra, unified memory, high-speed networking, and always-on autonomous agent support.

item.title: Halide co-founder is suing former partner for bringing source code to Apple
item.description: Lux Optics co-founder Sebastiaan de With made headlines when he joined Apple in late January. The company was behind Halide, one of the most popular photography apps for the iPhone, which gained a cult following for its robust pro-level controls. Apple was apparently a big enough fan that it tried to acquire the developer last […]

item.title: It’s been 20 years since the first tweet
item.description: On March 21, 2006, Jack Dorsey posted a simple message: “just setting up my twittr”.
